excluded_task_disposition: All four loops completed but failed sampled validation on finite corrupt muons outside the retained domain; their preserved ROOTs passed the committed exhaustive recovery gate and were published without recomputation.
precondition: Wait externally for g2-array-56106974-r4-resume.done before the first Slurm observation, preventing a concurrent resume of this active turn.
wake_policy: After r4 completion, observe only the eight originally nonfailed tasks. A real terminal event resumes once; final reconciliation must validate all twelve final pairs including recovered 1D/1E/1F/1P.
worker_uuid_policy: All existing worker UUIDs preserved; no replacement.
reset_credit_policy: The remaining personal Codex Full reset is protected and was not consumed.
